name: Cash.Medien AG
summary: Cash.Medien AG, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a media company in Germany. It publishes Cash., an investment magazine that offers information regarding life insurance, investment funds, real estate, and property investments and related topics to financial services providers and private investors. The company also operates cash-online.de, an Internet portal of the magazine that provides up-to-date information on investment and financial advisory topics; Cash.Onvista, a free email service newsletter; and Cash.TV that produces product presentations and company portraits for the investment industry. In addition, it evaluates investment offers on the capital market mainly focusing on real assets. Cash.Medien AG is based in Hamburg, Germany.
